# Gharnish

> Gharnish is a premium commercial furniture brand based in Hyderabad and Bangalore, India. It manufactures and supplies chairs, tables, bar stools, booth seating, outdoor furniture and complete dining sets for restaurants, cafes, hotels, bars, banquet halls and offices, with ready stock and 2–7 day pan-India delivery.

## Key facts
- Locations: Hyderabad (Telangana) and Bangalore (Karnataka), India
- Serves: pan-India delivery
- Founded: 2021
- Ready stock: 150+ chair designs, 25+ table varieties
- Delivery: 2–7 days for in-stock items
- Customisation: table tops, sizes, laminates and finishes are fully customisable
- Price range: chairs from ₹2,100; dining sets approximately ₹19,000–₹1,59,999
- Contact: WhatsApp +91 90592 76667

## Product range
- Dining and cafe chairs (PVC/fiber, cushioned, metal, wooden, cane, banquet)
- Bar and counter stools
- Dining tables (round, square, rectangular, 2/4/6-seater, bar-height, buffet)
- Table bases and tops (18mm ply, branded 1mm laminate, PVC edge banding)
- Booth and sofa seating (priced by running feet)
- Outdoor / rooftop furniture
- Complete restaurant dining sets

## Venues served
Restaurants, cafes, QSR / fast-casual, fine-dining, hotels, bars and lounges, rooftops, banquet halls, offices, jewellery showrooms.

## Selected projects
Barista, Cream Centre, Murugan Idly Shop, Ulavacharu, The Chocolate Room, Reliance Jio Mall, Always Sunday, Pita Pit.

## Links
- Website: https://gharnish.com/
- Enquiries: WhatsApp +91 90592 76667
